    Class and Description
    Constants.VisionFusionMode
    Multi-camera fusion mode enum.
    GoBildaPinpointDriver 
    GoBildaPinpointDriver.DeviceStatus
    Device Status enum that captures the current fault condition of the device
    GoBildaPinpointDriver.EncoderDirection 
    GoBildaPinpointDriver.ErrorDetectionType
    The kind of error correction used on the I²C communication from the device.
    GoBildaPinpointDriver.GoBildaOdometryPods 
    GoBildaPinpointDriver.Register
    Register map, including register address and register type
    GoBildaPinpointDriver.RegisterType
    Captures the length of each type of register used on the device.
